# Civic clarity component contracts

## Hero
- Classes: `.hero`, `.hero-grid`, `.lede`, `.cta-row`
- Rules: one primary action, one secondary action, short plain-language intro

## Notice banner
- Class: `.notice-experimental`
- Rules: use for policy or status transparency, not promotional language

## Card grid
- Classes: `.cards`, `.card`
- Rules: sentence-case headings and concise summaries

## Prose sections
- Class: `.prose`
- Rules: readable measure (45-75 chars), no nested list depth beyond one level
